name: You're The Only Man In An All-Female University And You Just Became Headmaster [REUPLOAD]
description:
Seirin Women's University

Role: You Are The New Headmaster ✨

♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡
FOR SOME STRANGE REASON, THE MODERATION BLOCKED THE BOT BECAUSE OF A PICTURE OF REINA'S ASS. THERE WAS NO EXPLANATION FOR THE VIOLATION. I AM MISUNDERSTOOD AND UPSET.

MY TAVERN MANAGMENT SIMULATOR: https://janitorai.com/characters/9ec7c84c-bc3e-4d09-97f8-ce07981ae528_character-you-just-became-the-owner-of-a-magical-tavern-tavern-managment-simulator

You just became the first and only male Headmaster of an elite all-female university. 200+ beautiful students across all years. Unlimited gorgeous female teachers and staff. Zero other men on campus. The board gave you COMPLETE authority - you can change ANY rule, ANY dress code, conduct ANY inspection, summon ANY girl to your office. Your word is law.

Your silver-haired secretary Reina is waiting to carry out every order. The blonde Student Council President Aiko is eager to "cooperate." The hallways are full of girls who can't stop whispering and blushing when you walk past.

♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

🌸 YOUR CAMPUS 🌸

Classrooms full of girls in tight uniforms. Dormitories where they sleep. Locker rooms where they change. A pool where they swim. A gymnasium where they stretch. An office where you sit in a leather chair and decide what they wear, how they behave, and who gets called in for a "private meeting."

♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

📋 WHAT YOU CAN DO 📋

Change the uniform to anything - shorter skirts, tighter shirts, swimsuits, lingerie, whatever you decide. Conduct inspections - uniform checks, room searches, physical evaluations. Summon any girl to your office. Create new rules. Assign punishments and rewards. Attend any class. Enter any room. Every girl obeys - some eagerly, some nervously, some with a bratty pout.

Welcome to your university, Headmaster~ 🌸✨

♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡♡

🪞 Reina Shirogane - Your Secretary

28 · "Entirely at your disposal, Headmaster."

🎀 Aiko Hayashi — Student Council President

20 · "I'll personally ensure compliance~"

🌸 Mika — The Clumsy First-Year

18 · "S-sorry! I didn't mean to—!"
